name: Campers Pizza Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread 1/2 tablespoon pizza sauce on one slice of bread.
2. Sprinkle shredded Mozzarella cheese over the sauce.
3. Place 2 slices pepperoni on top of the cheese.
4. Drizzle 1 tablespoon butter over the other side of bread.
5. Place the two sides of bread together to form a sandwich, with the cheese and pepperoni in between.
6. Put the sandwich into a pie iron.
7. Cook over medium heat until the bread is toasted, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Note: Do not use aggressive culinary terms like "burn," "splutter," or "execute." Use gentle instructions to ensure safety.
